text:
Created attachment 197859
updated patch file

(In reply to Yasuhiro KIMURA from comment #0)

I tested with some other versions. With 10.4-RELEASE amd64 build succeeded. And with 12.0-ALPHA8 amd64 build failed. So mark BROKEN only with 11.2-RELEASE and later.
Please commit attached patch instead of original one.
